title: T-012 — Register DSL rule wo_state_machine_v1 in 02-SETTINGS rule registry
prompt:
# T-012 — Register DSL rule wo_state_machine_v1

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §10.1, §6 D1
Dependency: 02-SETTINGS §7 rule registry must exist (assume present from earlier modules).

## Goal
Register the wo_state_machine_v1 DSL rule per §10.1 in the 02-SETTINGS rule registry: states, transitions, guards, side_effects exactly as documented.

## Implementation contract
Create packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/wo-state-machine-v1.yaml with full state machine spec from §10.1. Add registration loader in packages/dsl-rules/src/registry/load-production-rules.ts that on app boot upserts rule_id 'wo_state_machine_v1' v1 active=true into rule_registry table (02-SETTINGS §7). Add unit test that the registered rule exposes 6 states (DRAFT/READY/IN_PROGRESS/PAUSED/COMPLETED/CANCELLED) and the 6 transitions from §10.1 with their guards.

## Files (scope)
- packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/wo-state-machine-v1.yaml [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/registry/load-production-rules.ts [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/__tests__/wo-state-machine-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the rules loader runs, when rule_registry queried for 'wo_state_machine_v1', then row exists with version='v1', active=true, payload includes 6 states and 6 transitions per §10.1
2. Given rule loaded, when load output is parsed, then transitions[READY→IN_PROGRESS].guards include 'allergen_changeover_gate_v1_passes_or_not_required' (§10.1)
3. Given rule loaded, when transitions[IN_PROGRESS→COMPLETED].side_effects parsed, then they include 'enqueue_outbox(d365_push, output_yield_gate_eval)'

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/dsl-rules/src/__tests__/wo-state-machine-v1.test.ts asserting 6 states + 6 transitions + specific guards before YAML exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter dsl-rules test wo-state-machine-v1'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change state list (locked at D1)
- Do not add side_effects beyond §10.1
- Do not register rule outside 02-SETTINGS rule_registry table

pipeline_inputs.description: Register wo_state_machine_v1 DSL rule (states+transitions+guards+side_effects) in 02-SETTINGS rule_registry.
pipeline_inputs.details: Materialize §10.1 YAML spec in packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/wo-state-machine-v1.yaml. Loader upserts into rule_registry on app boot. 02-SETTINGS owns rule_registry schema; this task only registers the rule, does not modify the registry table. Tests assert state/transition/guard payload integrity.
out_of_scope: Do not modify rule_registry table schema (02-SETTINGS owns)
Do not implement rule evaluation engine here

Given rule loaded, when transitions[READY→IN_PROGRESS].guards parsed, then include 'allergen_changeover_gate_v1_passes_or_not_required'
Given rule loaded, when transitions[IN_PROGRESS→COMPLETED].side_effects parsed, then include 'enqueue_outbox(d365_push, output_yield_gate_eval)'
